AyMeeko's Cookbook
  • List

Strawberry Smoothie

Words of Wisdom
If the protein powder is added at the beginning, it becomes super aerated and thick, which makes it hard to drink. I did not enjoy this.
Yield 1 serving
Preparation time 5m
Cook time 0m
Recipe Link MacroFactor
Calories 219
Protein 34g
Fat 2g
Carbs 19g
Ingredients
  • 100g Dannon Light+Fit Greek Yogurt, Vanilla
  • 100g Kirkland Frozen Strawberries
  • 1 scoop Kirkland Whey Chocolate Protein Powder
  • Cold water to desired consistency
Instructions
  1. Place shaker cup on scale and zero it out
  2. Add yogurt, strawberries, and some cold water
  3. Blend until desired consistency
  4. Add the protein powder to blender
  5. Pulse a few times until mixed.
  6. Drink immediately.
